/usr/local/cuda-13.2/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -ccbin=/usr/bin/c++  -Xcompiler=-fopenmp -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Xcompiler=-Wall -O3 -lineinfo -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_120,code=[sm_120]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/lightgbm.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/lightgbm.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/lightgbm.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
